name: Damac Islands Phase 2
description:
Damac Islands Phase 2 at Dubailand is the recently introduced community based on the most cherished approaches executed by the renowned Damac Properties. Following the success of the experimental first phase of this community, Dubai’s leading, quality, and innovative vision has launched this second phase defined by the tropical sanctuary just moments from the city’s engaging pulse. Blending the tranquil escape with seamless access to the prime attractions, this address is crafted for elite residents to balance the island’s serenity with urban convenience. Revolving around the core theme of world-famous tropical islands, this master community showcases the true essence of the island with modern and communal leisure.

This beautifully envisioned locality is the improvised phase of the innovative and highly desirable previous phase of the community. Planned ideally, this region is brimming with tons of elements such as aquatic relaxation and adventurous facilities, verdant sites for joyful and exploring interactive sites, and many leisure options of shopping, charming cafes, and expensive dining spaces, and many more essential features.

location.address: Announcing the new and ground-breaking residential community of Damac Islands Phase 2 amidst the sandy and aloof region of vast Dubailand. Right at the intersection of Al Qudra and major Emirates Roads, this destination is known for the Arabian-cultural and geographical aspects. However, the futuristic strategies of crafting lush green and human-friendly urban living setup, making it a reliable and one of the most appreciated regions of the Emirates for permanent upscale living and property investment. The highway connection fosters quick access to the nearby mixed-used communities, tourist sites, and prime landmarks such as Motor City, Sports City, Global Village, Dubai marina, Burj Al Arab, MBR City, and Business Bay.

name: Damac District
description:
Damac District at Damac Hills is a multi-purpose development of complexes by Damac Properties in Dubai, blending luxurious 1 & 2-bedroom apartments & offices. With three towers, this property launch is more than just homes where contemporary infrastructure meets nature’s beauty. Enveloped by the verdant parklands and the evolving residential landscape, it’s a visionary property crafted by the city’s leading developer in a most desirable locality. Configuring decent-sized homes and office spaces, the entire property promises an ideal environment for families and professionals. Welcome to one of the highly sought-after and appreciated communities of the city, perfect for living, investing and working.

This 42 million square feet masterfully imagined community in Dubailand region unveils every day a world to discovery and rejuvenation with people in a safe, green, and tranquil environment. In the heart of this paradise, there is Trump International Golf Club with a 30 thousand square feet opulent clubhouse for professionals and golf-lovers, while an infinity swimming pool and dining facilities are curated for leisure gatherings and recreation. Malibu Bay brings the ethos of California into this fun and relaxing setting that offers a wave pool with sandy beach and ocean-like waves. Many tennis courts and a skate park with ramps, bowls, and rails ensure an endless, adventurous and playful environment. A fishing lake is a tranquil escape for relaxing with families and the stables and trails are also provided for unmatched equestrian and riding experiences.

Made with simple yet contemporary minimalistic architectural approaches, each of the three mid-rise towers are positioned ideally to embrace the views and charm of the landscaped surroundings. The facade of each complex captures a timeless elegance with striking and open-plan dynamic styles. Expensive glass-made windows finely arranged balconies, and quality-oriented detailing with durable infrastructure, this tri-towers address becomes a reliable choice for living and working in the premier and expensive setting.

Interiors are crafted to endure sophisticated simplicity, where every carefully sculpted detail is chosen to reflect the contemporary elegance. Each unit stands as a peaceful sanctuary with warm and earthy tones, organic textures, and materials that bring the beauty of nature into the private heaven where design flows in a soothing ambience. The hand-picked finishes, soft and bright hues, and bespoke attention to detail with artisanal craftsmanship and quality fixtures and fittings create a setting that reflects who you are with a refined taste and unique style.

With these revolutionary approaches, every day is elevated to something extraordinary, as the residents will have access to Signature residential amenities. Find the utmost sense of relaxation and recreation of body and mind at the calm palm garden, whispering waters, an organic pool, a yoga garden, and a cloud Zen lounge. Engage in fitness and joyful socialisation activities at the premium BBQ stations, kids' playgrounds, gym, & AI training lab, gaming lounge, and padel courts.
highlights: An expensive collection of over a thousand 1 and 2-bedroom luxury apartments and office spaces
The grand development with biophilic design, asymmetrical & creative alignment of balconies, and glass-made facade with a striking and compelling appeal
Featuring, a luxurious & private entrance lobby with the amenity podium terrace curated with quality texture, element, and green landscapes with playful & relaxation areas
Exclusive Residential amenities for fitness and relaxation purposes, such as yoga garden, an organic pool, whispering waters, gaming lounge, gym & AI training lab, and Cloud Zen lounge
Signature Office amenities are dedicated to the professionals, including an outdoor gym & yoga, office canteen, indoor gym, haven workspace, relaxation area, outdoor meeting pods
Harmonious interiors enhance by the nature-sourced elements, finishes, and earthy hues that imitate the nature’s beauty in every curated luxurious corner

location.address: Choose your luxury home within Dubai’s one of the highly celebrated communities of Damac Hills linked to an amazing network of highways and roads. Situated in the spectacular Dubailand, this region is alongside the Arabian Ranches and enclosed by Sports City and Dubai Autodrome. Every side of this locality touches a road network, including Hessa Street and Al Qudra and the prime Emirates Road. This excellent availability benefits the residents a fluent access to the entire city and major landmarks, tourist sites, cultural and financial hubs such as international airport of Al Maktoum, Business Bay, JVC, Dubai Marina, the Palm, Burj Khalifa, and many more.

name: Chelsea Residences
description:
Chelsea Residences at Dubai Maritime City is the newest advancement by Damac Properties launching soon with premium class 1 to 3-bedroom apartments in Dubai. Experience the high-standard lifestyle at this refined jewel of Dubai Maritime City emerges at its center, creates a new sophisticated residence experience by the waterfront. The design concept of this project takes its inspiration from sophisticated elegance to create perfect blend between traditional European art and Dubai's exciting waterfront development. The development provides elevated aesthetics that merge effectively with urban visionary development to establish pinnacle waterfront living standards within the city.

The modern building present an elegant facade and luxurious interior designs while providing unobstructed views of the Arabian Gulf. Every design element of the project demonstrates a grandiose touch including the podium gardens and double-height lobbies in addition to the fluid indoor/outdoor space transitions. The lifestyle represents the personal preference of people beyond basic homeownership because it provides sanctuary while preserving privacy together with prestige and spacious living.

This visionary phase consists of three rising masterpieces with a ground and 2 podiums in all buildings and distinguished as Tower A with 25 floors, Tower B with 28 floors, and Tower C with 30 floors overlooking the sea and the flourishing bustle of the city. Each home unit has the privilege of finest wellness, fitness, adventure, and dining experiences just steps away. This includes Lion Beach, a beach club, an infinity pool, kids’ pool, a running track, gym, yoga areas, rain therapy, an athlete spa, and many more are the major options to revitalize and relax in this iconic address. However, the healthy fine dining, Mono Diet Café, and table dine with legends sunset bar are the prime dining facilities for the natives.

The residential areas welcome everyone to experience a peaceful elegant lifestyle through wide open spaces that let natural illumination enter and reveal upscale interior details. Multiple home types exist which feature apartments together with dwellings, all built with intentional space planning along with high-tier construction materials. The residents can look out at stunning sunsets from their private balcony while using their elegant living rooms to entertain visitors through an experience that combines personal touch with expansive grandeur.

Damac continues its reputation for developing iconic real estate through this newest façade where regional sophistication unites with international sophistication. This development finds its home in Dubai Maritime City while it develops into an elite residential and commercial waterfront community which integrates charm and financial opportunity. In today's society which focuses on premium exclusivity and accomplishments this one represents a unique mark of luxury.
highlights: Offering an impeccable collection of 1, 2, and 3-bedroom apartments where aquatic serenity meets the modern life vitality
A grand development divided in two phases in which each phase offers three towers

Phase one combines 107.4 metres high Tower A with a ground, two podiums, and 25 floors, 115.1 metres Tower B with two podiums and 28 floors, and 121.9 metres high Tower C with two podiums and 30 levels
Sleek and contemporary design with landscaped greenery on various levels and striking glass facade
Positioned in the mixed-use waterfront maritime location close to many industries, commercial hubs, and key attractions of Dubai
Exquisite and vast interiors designed with 3.4 metres high ceiling heights in master bedrooms and living rooms that feature dining area and modern kitchen
Each unit enjoy harmonious views of the sea and the vibrant lush setting of the city through the floor-to-ceiling windows
World-class built-in amenities of an infinity beach pool, kids’ pool, Chelsea Lion Beach, a Beach Club, outdoor gym, indoor & outdoor yoga areas, and serenity spa etc.

location.address: The Residences situates itself perfectly in Dubai Maritime City which is a developing coastal area destined to become one of Dubai’s elite maritime destinations. Residents of the development benefit from unimpeded sea views while experiencing an urban atmosphere heritage with present-day luxury positioning between Port Rashid and the Mina Rashid Yachts & Marina. The advantageous positioning allows residents to reach all significant Dubaic destination effortlessly. The leisure district of Jumeirah together with Downtown Dubai and DIFC can be reached within a few minutes by driving from this location.
